evals.prompt: Create a UserService class with @api() decorator that has baseURL https://api.example.com. Include a getUser(@path() id: number) method using @get() that returns Promise<User>, and a createUser(@body() user: User) method using @post(). Use NamedFetcher to register the fetcher.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript file with UserService class using @ahoo-wang/fetcher-decorator package with proper decorators and types

evals.prompt: Build a PostService with @api('/posts') for CRUD operations: list posts with @get('') returning Post[], get single post with @get('/{postId}'), create with @post(''), update with @put('/{postId}'), and delete with @del('/{postId}'). Use @path() for path parameters and @query() for filtering.
evals.expected_output: Complete CRUD service with all HTTP methods and proper parameter decorators

evals.prompt: Create a service that extends BaseUserService using service inheritance pattern. BaseUserService has a @get('/status') method. Child service TypicodeUserService should add @get('/posts') with @path('userId') and @query() for filtering. Both should use the same NamedFetcher.
evals.expected_output: Service inheritance implementation with parent/child services sharing a fetcher
